hamilton.answer: Lewis Hamilton is one of the most successful drivers in Formula 1 history.

verstappen.answer: Max Verstappen is a Formula 1 driver known for driving for Red Bull Oracle Racing team.

ferrari.answer: Ferrari is one of the most successful teams in Formula 1 history.

mercedes.answer: Mercedes is one of the most dorminant teams in the modern era of Formula 1

drs.answer: DRS stands for Drag Reduction System. It's a system that helps cars reduce aerodynamic drag and increase overtaking chances by increasing straightline speed
